CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Continued To Feb-13-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Graham B. Lippsmith, Esq., for Petitioner: Miroslaw Mazuchowski, present as Guardian at litem for: Matthew Mazuchowski, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $20,000.00
Costs $20,000.00
A net balance of $40,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 4213 1st Street, Livermore, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim of a Minor
and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
